title: Smart Choice Puppy Dental Teething Dog Play Toy Tube Pet Train Chew Healthy Gums Soft Rubber Toothbrush Interactive
features: CHEWING: Dealing with your puppy during their teething phase can be tedious at the best of times, but with this engaging chew toy you can support your pup's dental health while simultaneously keeping them entertained.

TEETH: This fantastic chew toy has been ergonomically designed to support your puppies teething phase, and promote good dental hygiene in dogs of all ages. Simply apply your doggy friendly toothpaste and let the toy do the rest.

TREAT TIME: In between cleans, treat your furry friend by adding their favourite snack to the toy. Insert their favourite kibble into the groves or smoother the chew with peanut butter, the possibilities are endless!
DURABLE: Perfect purchase dogs that love to chew. Item is made from nontoxic rubber that can be filled at either end or down the centre.
SIZE: Each item measures approximately 15 x 4cm. Available in Blue, orange or green. Colours sent at random.
